summary: A USCIS Alien Registration Requirement public service announcement titled 'The Cost of Inaction', built from branded title cards and stock and file B-roll (handcuffs and fingerprint card, detainees seated on an ICE bus) over an instructional voiceover stating fines and incarceration follow failure to register. It carries no music track. On-screen text reads 'ARR Alien Registration Requirement', 'THE COST OF INACTION', 'If you fail to comply, and incarceration', 'POLICE ICE', and 'FOR MORE INFO: USCIS.GOV/ALIENREGISTRATION'.
notable_text: ARR Alien Registration Requirement; THE COST OF INACTION; If you fail to comply, and incarceration; POLICE ICE; FOR MORE INFO: USCIS.GOV/ALIENREGISTRATION
